content: Use third-party services to store your backups. Ideal for connecting external cloud storage platforms.

comment.text: This text describes the option to store backups using external cloud storage services. It appears as a description within the Backup Service Dialog, helping users understand how to connect to third-party storage platforms. This option is ideal for users who prefer to manage their backups off-site.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence 'Հարմար է արտաքին ամպային պահուստներ միանալու համար' translates to 'Ideal for connecting external cloud backups', whereas the English source says 'Ideal for connecting external cloud storage platforms'. The error changes the object from 'storage platforms' to 'backups'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Օգտվեք երրորդ կողմի ծառայություններից ձեր պահուստները պահպանելու համար։ Հարմար է արտաքին ամպային պահպանման հարթակներին միանալու համար։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'third-party services' is translated as '세 번째 서비스', which literally means 'third service' (as in 1st, 2nd, 3rd). In a technical context, 'third-party' should be translated as '제3자' or '외부'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 외부 서비스를 사용하여 백업을 저장하세요. 외부 클라우드 스토리지 플랫폼을 연결하는 데 적합합니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'cloud' (ຟັງ - likely a typo for ຄລາວ or meant to be 'cloud') is translated/transliterated as 'ຟັງ' (fang), which in Lao typically means 'to listen'. This changes the meaning from 'cloud storage' to 'listening storage'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ໃຊ້ບໍລິການພາກສ່ວນທີສາມເພື່ອເກັບຮັກສາການສໍາຮອງຂໍ້ມູນຂອງທ່ານ. ເຫມາະສໍາລັບການເຊື່ອມຕໍ່ເວທີການເກັບຮັກສາຄລາວພາຍນອກ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'backups' is translated as 'dubultniekus' (which means 'twins' or 'doubles'), instead of the technical term for data backups 'kopijas' or 'rezerves kopijas'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Izmantojiet trešo pušu pakalpojumus, lai saglabātu savas rezerves kopijas. Ideāli piemēroti, lai savienotu ārējas mākoņu krātuves platformas.
